GLOBAL BANKING OPERATIONS SOP MANUAL
End-to-End Operational Workflows for Static Data (CDS), Asset Servicing, Trade Settlement Lifecycle,
and Tax Processing
Document ID: SOP-OPS-
GLOBAL-2026-V4
Effective Date: July 1, 2026Target Division: Global
Market Operations
Security Class: Strictly
Confidential
Primary Systems: SWIFT
ISO 15022/20022, XENTIS,
WM-Daten, Telekurs
Market Infrastructure:
Clearstream, Euroclear,
DTC, CBF
Governance Rule: Dual
Control (4-Eyes Principle)
Audit Cycle: Annual /
CSDR Compliant
OPERATIONAL DATASET NOTICE: This Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) manual serves as a granular execution
blueprint for institutional middle-office and back-office banking operations. Every section details exact system inputs, screen
codes, field validations, Maker-Checker authorization protocols, exception matrices, and SWIFT message structures. Analysts
must follow these procedures without deviation. 
MODULE 1: CDS, KURSINFO & STATIC DATA MANAGEMENT (SOP-SDM-001)
1.1 Neutral Control & Security Master Creation Workflow
The Security Master Database (SMDB) is the core golden source for all financial instrument static data. Incorrect instrument
attributes directly trigger downstream settlement failures, inaccurate tax withholdings, and miscalculated corporate action
entitlements. 
HIGH OPERATIONAL RISK: Inaccurate day-count convention (e.g., ACT/360 vs 30/360) or incorrect coupon frequency setup
causes multi-million EUR interest payment discrepancies across trading books. Neutral Control verification must be completed
prior to system trade execution. 
Detailed Execution Steps (Instrument Creation):
MAKER (L1 ANALYST)Receive Request & Data Ingestion: Log into Core Operations Suite (UI-SMDB-101). Open new
ticket. Input primary identifier: ISIN (ISO 6166), WKN (German Securities Identification), SEDOL, or CUSIP. 
MAKER (L1 ANALYST)Primary Data Scrubbing: Cross-reference automated feeds from WM-Daten (VFA/GV1), 
Bloomberg (DES page), and official Issuer Prospectus. Populate field-level security attributes as detailed in Table 1.1
below. 
MAKER (L1 ANALYST)Tax & Regulatory Classification: Assign Capital Gains Tax flag, German KapESt eligibility, MiFID II
/ MiFIR Complex Instrument indicator, CFI Code (ISO 10962), and FISN (ISO 18774). 
CHECKER (L2 NEUTRAL CONTROL SUPERVISOR)Neutral Control Verification: Access Pending Queue (UI-SMDB-
APPROVE). Independently verify entered attributes against the legally binding Final Terms Prospectus PDF attached to the
record. Verify that instrument coupon dates do not fall on non-clearing bank holidays (TARGET2, US FedWire, CHAPS). 
SYSTEMAutomated Validation & Broadcast: Upon L2 electronic sign-off, system generates STATUS::RELEASED,
assigns internal Instrument ID, and broadcasts updates via Kafka topic staticdata.instrument.master to trading
engines and settlement modules within 300ms.

1.2 Kursinfo: Market Price & FX Feed Maintenance
Kursinfo governs the daily automated ingestion, tolerance checking, manual override, and downstream distribution of valuation
prices (Equities, Fixed Income, Derivatives) and Foreign Exchange (FX) spot/forward rates required for end-of-day mark-to-
market, collateral valuation, and NAV calculations. 
Daily Execution Schedule & Process Flow:
17:30 CET (Batch 1 - European Closing): Ingestion of Clearstream/WM-Daten and Reuters closing prices. System
executes automated tolerance algorithms.
22:00 CET (Batch 2 - Americas Closing): Ingestion of US Market feeds and Bloomberg BVAL / IDC pricing feeds.
Price Outlier Tolerance Rules:
Equities & ETFs: Any price variation > ±5.00% versus previous business day close triggers immediate staging flag 
FLAG_PRICE_OUTLIER.
Fixed Income (Bonds): Any clean price movement > ±2.50% or yield shift > 25 basis points triggers 
FLAG_YIELD_SPIKE.
FX Cross Rates: Any exchange rate movement > ±1.50% triggers FLAG_FX_DEV.
STEP-BY-STEP MANUAL PRICE OVERRIDE PROCEDURE:
Open Kursinfo Monitoring Dashboard (UI-KURS-302) filter by status STAGED_TOLERANCE_BREACH.
Inspect secondary sources: Reuters 3000, Bloomberg Terminal (ALLX / BVAL), or official Stock Exchange bulletin.
If feed price is confirmed valid (e.g., corporate news / market rally), click [Confirm Feed Price] and attach source
screenshot.
If feed price is erroneous (stale data from vendor), select [Manual Price Override]. Input validated price, select source
( SRC_MANUAL_BROKER_QUOTE), attach broker quote PDF/email, and submit for L2 approval.
L2 Supervisor reviews audit trail in UI-KURS-AUTH and performs 4-Eyes release prior to 23:00 CET valuation deadline.
1.3 Counterparty Static Data & Standard Settlement Instructions (SSI)
Standard  Settlement  Instructions  (SSIs)  contain  depository,  custodian,  and  Nostro  account  details  for  counterparties.
Maintenance of SSI static data requires strict verification to eliminate fraud and delivery errors.

MODULE 2: END-TO-END TRADE LIFECYCLE & SETTLEMENT PROCESSING
(SOP-SETT-002)
2.1 Trade Capture, Allocation & Pre-Settlement Matching
The  trade  lifecycle  spans  execution,  capture,  allocation,  matching,  instruction  generation,  settlement,  and  reconciliation.
Straight-Through Processing (STP) is enforced for 95%+ of volume; manual intervention is restricted to exception queues. 
Step-by-Step Processing Pipeline:
Trade Ingestion (T+0 Execution Day): Trades enter core system (XENTIS/FO-GATEWAY) via FIX Protocol (ISO 15022
converted) or broker feeds. Trades automatically pass through static data validation (ISIN existence, open trading books,
counterparty credit line check). 
Block Allocation Processing: For institutional funds, block trades executed at fund group level are allocated to individual
sub-fund portfolios based on electronic allocation instructions (MT515 or CTM allocation message). System validates that
allocated quantity sum equals master block quantity. 
Pre-Settlement Matching (SWIFT MT518 / MT509): System automatically transmits SWIFT MT518 (Confirmation) to
counterparty or matching utility (DTCC CTM). System compares inbound counterparty MT518/MT509 message against
internal trade record. 
Matching Attribute SWIFT Tag / Field Matching Tolerance Failure Resolution
Trade Date / Settle Date :98A::TRAD / :
98A::SETT
Zero Tolerance (Exact Match)Amend internal record if broker trade
recap confirms error.
Nominal / Quantity :36B::SETT Zero Tolerance (Exact Match)Contact Front Office for partial fill or
mis-booking check.
Net Settlement Amount :19A::SETT Tolerance: ≤ €2.00 (Currency
Rounding)
Accept rounding difference if within
limit; otherwise raise broker query.
Place of Settlement (PSET):95P::PSET Zero Tolerance (Exact BIC
Match)
Update local instruction route to
match counterparty depository.
2.2 SWIFT Settlement Instruction Generation (MT540 - MT543)
Upon successful pre-settlement matching, the settlement engine automatically constructs and transmits outbound SWIFT ISO
15022 Category 5 settlement instructions to domestic CSDs (e.g., Clearstream Frankfurt - CBF, DTC) or ICSDs (Euroclear
Bank, Clearstream Luxembourg). 
1. 
2. 
3. 
CONFIDENTIAL — GLOBAL BANKING OPERATIONS OPERATIONAL DATASET Page 3 of 8

SWIFT MESSAGE SELECTION MATRIX:
MT540 = Receive Free of Payment (RFOP) — Non-trade / Collateral / Stock Loan.
MT541 = Receive Against Payment (RVP) — Securities Purchase / Cash Debit.
MT542 = Deliver Free of Payment (DFOP) — Transfer Out / Collateral Return.
MT543 = Deliver Against Payment (DVP) — Securities Sale / Cash Credit.
Field-Level Outbound SWIFT Structure Reference:
SWIFT Tag Field Name Example Format & Data Mandatory Validation
:20C::SEME Sender Reference :SEME//TRAD202607210089Unique alphanumeric key generated
by core engine.
:23G: Function of Message NEWM (New) / CANC (Cancel) Must be NEWM for initial setup.
:35B: Instrument Identification ISIN DE0001102580
Govt Bond 1.00% 2030
ISIN structure format check.
:95a::PSET Place of Settlement :95P::PSET//CSTRDEFF
(Clearstream Frankfurt)
Must match target CSD BIC code.
:97A::SAFE Safekeeping Account :97A::SAFE//65432109 Must match internal client depot
account number.
2.3 Non-Trade Operations & Internal Depot Movements
Non-trade operations encompass free-of-payment transfers, collateral rehypothecation, fund unit creations/redemptions, and
internal depot rebalancing. These movements bypass execution venues but require full settlement authorization. 
OPERATIONAL PROTOCOL FOR NON-TRADE MOVEMENTS:
Initiate instruction in UI-NTRD-100. Select movement code: MOV_COLLATERAL, MOV_INTERNAL_REBAL, or 
MOV_FOP_TRANSFER.
Attach mandatory support documentation (e.g., Collateral Management Agreement, Transfer Request Form signed by
Authorized Signatory).
System verifies that source depot has sufficient unencumbered inventory (AVAILABLE_QTY >= TRANSFER_QTY).
L2 Supervisor conducts 4-Eyes verification against client mandate and authorizes release.
2.4 Exception & Failed Trade Resolution (CSDR Compliance)
Settlement failure monitoring relies on real-time processing of inbound **SWIFT MT548 (Settlement Status & Processing
Advice)** messages. Under the EU Central Securities Depositories Regulation (CSDR), failing trades incur daily mandatory
cash penalties and potential compulsory buy-in procedures. 
• 
• 
• 
•

2. 
3. 
4.

MT548 Status Reason Code Root Cause Explanation Mandatory Action Steps
NMAT SSIR Settlement Details / SSI Mismatch
(Counterparty delivering to wrong depot).
Extract MT548 narrative. Contact
Counterparty MO. Issue MT542/543
cancellation and re-instruct with
corrected SSI.
PENDF LACK Lack of Securities / Position Shortage at
local depository.
Trigger immediate Securities Lending
/ Borrowing request to borrow stock,
or pull position from secondary depot.
PENDF MONY Insufficient Cash Funds at Custodian / CSD.Escalate to Treasury Desk for
intraday liquidity transfer or Nostro
concentration wire.
PENDF CLBR Counterparty Failing / On Hold. Issue official SWIFT MT599 chase
message to counterparty settlement
desk every 2 hours until resolution.
CSDR PENALTY & BUY-IN CONTROL RULES:
1. Daily Cash Penalty Assessment: Calculated daily by CSD from Intended Settlement Date ($SD$) until actual settlement
date. Penalty rates: Sovereign Bonds (0.10 bps), Corporate Bonds (0.25 bps), Liquid Equities (1.00 bps).
2. Buy-In Execution Window: If trade remains failing at $SD + 4$ business days (Liquid Equities) or $SD + 7$ business days
(Bonds/Illiquid), Settlement Desk must issue mandatory Buy-In Notice to failing counterparty and engage Buy-In Agent. 
2.5 Nostro & Depot Reconciliation Operations
Reconciliation ensures that physical inventory held at custodians matches internal core ledger balances. 
Depot Reconciliation (Stock Rec): Ingestion of **SWIFT MT535 (Statement of Holdings)** daily at 06:00 CET. Automated
engine compares MT535 balances against core inventory (XENTIS_DEPOT_BAL). Breaks are logged in UI-REC-535.
Nostro Reconciliation (Cash Rec): Ingestion of **SWIFT MT940 (End of Day Statement)** / **MT950**. System matches
individual cash movements against ledger cash journal entries. Unmatched cash lines trigger break tickets.
Break Category SLA Threshold Investigation Procedure Escalation Level
Stock Difference 24 Hours ($T+1$) Cross-check pending trades,
unsettled corporate action deliveries,
or unbooked stock transfers.
L2 Operations Manager
Unmatched Cash
Credit
48 Hours ($T+2$) Query Custodian via MT592 for
sender details. Check for unnotified
coupon/dividend proceeds.
Head of Asset Servicing
Nostro Cash
Overdraft
Immediate (Same Day)Identify failing delivery trade or
unexpected fee debit. Arrange
intraday funding wire.
Head of Operations & Treasury
MODULE 3: ASSET SERVICING & CORPORATE ACTIONS OPERATIONS (SOP-
AST-003)
3.1 Corporate Action Event Announcement & Golden Record Creation
Asset Servicing manages Mandatory and Voluntary Corporate Actions across global markets. The fundamental principle is
creating a singular **Golden Record** by synthesizing multi-source market data feeds to eliminate single-provider risk. 
• 
• 
CONFIDENTIAL — GLOBAL BANKING OPERATIONS OPERATIONAL DATASET Page 5 of 8

Data Scrubbing & Golden Record Synthesis Steps:
AUTOMATED INGESTION System ingests corporate action notifications via **SWIFT MT564**, **WM-Daten (ED/KD/FD)**,
**Bloomberg (CACS)**, and **Telekurs (FinancialID)**. 
MAKER (ASSET SERVICING ANALYST) Open Event Scrubbing Workbench (UI-CA-101). System highlights field
discrepancies across data vendors in RED. 
MAKER (ASSET SERVICING ANALYST) Apply Data Source Precedence Hierarchy Rule (Table 3.1) to resolve discrepancies.
Manually verify against official Issuer Gazette or Direct Custodian Agent notice where required. 
CHECKER (ASSET SERVICING L2) Review synthesized Golden Record attributes (Ex-Date, Record Date, Payment Date,
Gross Rate, Option Elements) and approve record creation (STATUS::GOLDEN_RECORD_CONFIRMED). 
Market / Asset Class Primary Source (Tier 1) Secondary Source (Tier 2)Tertiary Source (Tier 3)
DACH Equities & BondsWM-Daten (Corporate Actions
Feed)

(BNY/Citi)

Eurobonds / ICSD IssuesEuroclear Bank / Clearstream
Lux
Six Financial (Telekurs) Bloomberg CACS
3.2 Voluntary Corporate Action Instruction Management
Voluntary events (e.g., Tender Offers, Rights Issues, Dividend Options - DVOP) require soliciting elections from ultimate
beneficial owners, aggregating instructions, and transmitting formatted execution instructions to custodians prior to market cut-
off times. 
CRITICAL CUT-OFF CONTROL: Missing a voluntary event deadline results in default option execution (frequently default
cash or lapse of rights), creating significant financial liability. Internal cut-off times must be strictly set ahead of custodian cut-
offs. 
Voluntary Event Execution Timeline & Workflow:
Timeline Milestone Operational Task & System Action Control Output

Days)
Broadcast MT564 Corporate Action Notification to all portfolio
managers / underlying clients holding settled stock on Ex-Date.
Specify Internal Client Cut-Off Date.
MT564 Notification Log; Delivery
receipt confirmation.
Internal Cut-Off ($T-2$
Days)
Client Election Deadline: System aggregates incoming client
elections via portal or MT565. Uninstructed positions default to
Issuer Default Option.
UI-CA-565 Aggregated Election
Summary Report.
Custodian Cut-Off
($T-1$ Day)
Transmit aggregated electronic **SWIFT MT565 (Corporate
Action Instruction)** to ICSD/Custodian. System tracks SWIFT
status (ACK / NACK).
MT565 Transmission Log with
positive ACK header.
Execution / Payment
($T+0$)
Process MT566 (Confirmation). Debit/credit stock and cash
inventory based on elected option parameters.
Entitlement Balance Verification
( UI-CA-RECON).
3.3 Income & Dividend Distribution Processing
Income processing handles mandatory cash payments (Cash Dividends - DVCA, Bond Coupons - INTR, Capital Gains
Distributions). 
1. 
2. 
3. 
4. 
CONFIDENTIAL — GLOBAL BANKING OPERATIONS OPERATIONAL DATASET Page 6 of 8

ENTITLEMENT CALCULATION FORMULA & MANUFACTURED DIVIDENDS:
$$ ext{Gross Entitlement} = ext{Settled Position at Record Date Close} imes ext{Gross Event Rate}$$ Market Rule for Trades
Spanning Ex-Date: Trades executed prior to Ex-Date but settling after Record Date entitle the buyer to the dividend. If seller
receives payment, system triggers automated Market Claim / Claims Transformation generating MT544/MT546 adjustment
instructions under market practice guidelines. 
MODULE 4: GLOBAL OPERATIONAL TAX SERVICES (SOP-TAX-004)
4.1 Client Onboarding & Tax Documentation Maintenance
Operational Tax Services govern client tax documentation, relief at source, withholding tax reclaims, and annual FATCA / CRS
regulatory reporting. Incomplete or expired tax documentation requires applying maximum statutory withholding tax rates. 
Required Tax Documentation Matrix:
Client Entity Type Mandatory Tax Forms Validity Period System Tax Code

circumstances)

(Indiv.)

Residence

(FATCA Verification)

German Resident InvestorNV-Bescheinigung (Non-
Assessment) or Freistellungsauftrag
Max 3 Years / Annual TAX_DE_EXEMPT
4.2 Relief at Source (RAS) Processing
Relief at Source allows eligible non-resident investors to benefit from reduced Withholding Tax (WHT) rates under applicable
Double Taxation Treaties (DTT) directly on income payment date, bypassing lengthier post-payment reclaim processes. 
MAKER (TAX ANALYST) Verify client's DTT eligibility in Tax Master (UI-TAX-100). Cross-check country of tax residence
against local market treaty tables (e.g., US-Germany Treaty: reduced 15% rate on dividend income). 
MAKER (TAX ANALYST) Compile breakdown of underlying eligible positions 5 business days prior to Income Record Date.
Generate **Tax Relief Breakdown File**. 
CHECKER (TAX SUPERVISOR) Audit breakdown against validated W-8 / Form 6166 documents. Electronic sign-off in UI-
TAX-RELIEF. 
SYSTEM Transmit electronic Tax Breakdown file via authenticated secure channel to Paying Agent / Custodian. Custodian
applies treaty rate at payment execution. 
GERMAN WITHHOLDING TAX (KapESt) CALCULATION EXAMPLE:
Standard German Statutory Tax: 25.00% Capital Gains Tax (KapESt) + 5.50% Solidarity Surcharge (Soli) = 26.375% Effective
Gross Withholding.
Under US-German Double Tax Treaty (Relief at Source): Approved Treaty Rate = 15.00%.
Net Adjustment: System blocks 11.375% statutory deduction upon custodian instruction verification. 
1.

4.3 Post-Payment Tax Reclaim Operations
Where Relief at Source was not applied due to missing documentation prior to payment date, clients may file a formal post-
payment Tax Reclaim with the local tax authority (e.g., German Federal Central Tax Office - BZSt, French DGFiP, Swiss
ESTV). 
Reclaim Phase Operational Action Details Required Artifacts
1. Identification Identify un-relieved income events in UI-TAX-501
where Statutory Tax > Treaty Tax Rate. Calculate
recoverable reclaim amount.
Income Credit Advice; Tax Voucher
statement.
2. Dossier AssemblyAssemble official Tax Certificate (e.g., German 
Steuerbescheinigung), Form 6166 (US Certificate of
Residence), and Power of Attorney (PoA).
Certified Tax Certificate original PDF +
Physical Forms.
3. Filing SubmissionSubmit physical/electronic claim package to foreign Tax
Authority within statutory statute of limitations (e.g., 4
years for Germany, 3 years for France).
Registered Mail Receipt / Portal Reference
ID.
4. Reclaim Tracking &
Cash Booking
Monitor pending reclaim pipeline
( STATUS::PENDING_TAX_AUTH). Upon receipt of
refund funds into Nostro account, match credit against
outstanding tax reclaim ledger item and credit client
account.
MT940 Cash Receipt; Tax Refund Credit
Advice.
4.4 FATCA, CRS & Annual Tax Regulatory Reporting
Global tax compliance requires automated extraction, validation, XML schema generation, and reporting to tax authorities
under foreign account reporting regimes. 
US Chapter 4 FATCA / Qualified Intermediary (QI) Reporting: Generate annual **IRS Form 1042-S** for all US-source
income payments made to non-US persons. Validate aggregate payment data against Custodian 1042-S receipts. Submit
electronic file via IRS FIRE (File Information Returns Electronically) portal prior to March 15 deadline. 
Common Reporting Standard (CRS) / AEOI Reporting: Extract reportable accounts (foreign tax residency holders) from
Core CRM. System compiles reporting elements (Account Balance at Dec 31, Gross Interest, Dividends, Gross Sales
Proceeds) into local XML schema (e.g., BZSt Online Portal XML format). Submit to local competent authority by May 31. 
REGULATORY AUDIT & RECONCILIATION CONTROL: Prior to annual tax filing submission, the Head of Operational Tax
must execute 100% reconciliation between: 1. General Ledger Gross Tax Deductions.
2. Custodian Tax Breakdown Statements.
3. Aggregated Client 1042-S / CRS Reporting Files.
Any unexplained balance discrepancy > €100.00 halts automated filing transmission and requires manual reconciliation sign-
off.
